vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, wandering through the local park was a daily ritual that sparked my love for nature.
My friends and I would traverse the neighborhood on foot, discovering hidden shortcuts and secret gardens.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng/đắm mình trong sự thanh bình
vocab.example: I used to revel in the serenity of the early morning air while walking to the nearby lotus pond.

vocab.meaning: một chuyến đi dạo thong dong
vocab.example: Taking a leisurely stroll with my grandfather was the highlight of my weekends as a young child.

vocab.meaning: việc khám phá không có người đi kèm/giám sát
vocab.example: In those days, the streets were safe enough for children to engage in unaccompanied exploration of the town.

vocab.meaning: truyền lại niềm yêu thích cái gì đó
vocab.example: Those childhood walks bequeathed a love for the outdoors that remains with me to this day.
I loved walking because I would often stumble upon fascinating insects or unusual plants behind our house.
I have vivid recollections of walking barefoot on the grass, feeling completely connected to the earth.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra những kỷ niệm bền vững/khó quên
vocab.example: Walking to the local market with my mother helped us forge lasting memories and a very close bond.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác về sự tự chủ/tự lập
vocab.example: Being allowed to walk to school by myself gave me an early sense of autonomy and confidence.
